mapper.select: SELECT e.EMP_ID empId, e.EMP_NAME empName, e.EMP_PW empPw, e.EMP_TEL empTel, e.EMP_EMAIL empEmail, e.EMP_DEPTNO empDeptno, d.DNAME empDname, e.EMP_AUTH empAuth, a.AUTH_NAME empAuthName, e.EMP_FIRST empFirst, e.EMP_INOFFICE empInOffice, e.EMP_HIREDATE empHiredate FROM EMP e LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPT d ON e.EMP_DEPTNO = d.DEPTNO LEFT OUTER JOIN AUTH a ON e.EMP_AUTH = a.AUTH_NO WHERE upper(e.EMP_ID) = upper(#{empId}) and e.EMP_AUTH != 0 and e.EMP_INOFFICE in (0, 10)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP WHERE trim(UPPER(EMP_ID)) = trim(UPPER(#{empId})) AND TRIM(LOWER(EMP_EMAIL)) = TRIM(LOWER(#{empEmail})) AND EMP_AUTH != 0 AND EMP_INOFFICE in (0, 10)
mapper.update: UPDATE EMP SET EMP_PW = #{empPw}, EMP_FIRST = 'Y' WHERE trim(upper(EMP_ID)) = trim(upper(#{empId}))
